headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Teradyne, Raises Price Target to $400
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Samik Chatterjee   maintains Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $315 to $400.

headline: Teradyne Acquires TestInsight, Accelerating Time to Market for AI and Data Center Devices
summary: NORTH READING, Mass., April 16, 2026--Teradyne today announced it has acquired TestInsight, a leading provider of semiconductor test development, validation, and conversion software.

headline: Cathie Wood Slams The Brakes — Ark Invest Sits Out As S&P 500 Smashes Records
summary: Ark Invest made no trades in its six main ETFs for two straight days, a rare feat. Here's how the ETFs are performing in 2026.
